content_blocks.hs_subtext: Granite PM Academy's CAPM Bootcamp in {city_state} is an intensive three-day live-virtual course designed for professionals who want to earn the Certified Associate in Project Management credential quickly. Satisfies PMI's 23 contact hour requirement.

content_blocks.cb_subtext: Three focused days of live-virtual instruction. Everything {city} professionals need to pass the CAPM exam.
